commit_message:
Fixing endpoint standard behavior under back-to-back incoming requests Fixing endpoint standard behavior under back-to-back incoming requests This PR fixes an issue where back-to-back incoming requests at an endpoint standard could lead to responses having corrupted `pkt_type` field. It becomes noticeable when the design talking to the endpoint has a delay of at least two cycles between an incoming request and its response. 

There is already an assertion on this issue in the non-synthesizable
